verses.latin_vulgate: Anno septimo Jehu, regnavit Joas : et quadraginta annis regnavit in Jerusalem. Nomen matris ejus Sebia de Bersabee.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַת־שֶׁ֤בַע לְיֵהוּא֙ מָלַ֣ךְ יְהוֹאָ֔שׁ וְאַרְבָּעִ֣ים שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ צִבְיָ֖ה מִבְּאֵ֥ר שָֽׁבַע׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the seventh year of Jehu, Joas began to reign: and he reigned forty years in Jerusalem. The name of his mother was Sebia, of Bersabee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Seitsemäntenä Jehun vuotena tuli Joas kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi neljäkymmentä ajastaikaa Jerusalemissa. Hänen äitinsä nimi oli Ziba Bersabasta.
verses.king_james: In the seventh year of Jehu Jehoash began to reign; and forty years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Zibiah of Beer–sheba.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque Joas rectum coram Domino cunctis diebus quibus docuit eum Jojada sacerdos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַשׂ יְהוֹאָ֧שׁ הַיָּשָׁ֛ר בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה כׇּל־יָמָ֑יו אֲשֶׁ֣ר הוֹרָ֔הוּ יְהוֹיָדָ֖ע הַכֹּהֵֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joas did that which was right before the Lord all the days that Joiada, the priest, taught him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Joas teki sitä, mikä oikia oli ja Herralle hyvin kelpasi, niinkauvan kuin pappi Jojada opetti häntä;
verses.king_james: And Jehoash did that which was right in the sight of the Lord all his days wherein Jehoiada the priest instructed him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen excelsa non abstulit : adhuc enim populus immolabat, et adolebat in excelsis incensum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֥ק הַבָּמ֖וֹת לֹא־סָ֑רוּ ע֥וֹד הָעָ֛ם מְזַבְּחִ֥ים וּֽמְקַטְּרִ֖ים בַּבָּמֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: But yet he took not away the high places: for the people still sacrificed and burnt incense in the high places.
verses.finnish_biblia: Paitsi ettei hän pannut pois korkeuksia; sillä kansa uhrasi ja teki suitsutusta vielä korkeuksilla.
verses.king_james: But the high places were not taken away: the people still sacrificed and burnt incense in the high places.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Joas ad sacerdotes : Omnem pecuniam sanctorum, quæ illata fuerit in templum Domini a prætereuntibus, quæ offertur pro pretio animæ, et quam sponte et arbitrio cordis sui inferunt in templum Domini :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהוֹאָ֜שׁ אֶל־הַכֹּהֲנִ֗ים כֹּל֩ כֶּ֨סֶף הַקֳּדָשִׁ֜ים אֲשֶׁר־יוּבָ֤א בֵית־יְהֹוָה֙ כֶּ֣סֶף עוֹבֵ֔ר אִ֕ישׁ כֶּ֥סֶף נַפְשׁ֖וֹת עֶרְכּ֑וֹ כׇּל־כֶּ֗סֶף אֲשֶׁ֤ר יַֽעֲלֶה֙ עַ֣ל לֶב־אִ֔ישׁ לְהָבִ֖יא בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joas said to the priests: all the money of the sanctified things, which is brought into the temple of the Lord by those that pass, which is offered for the price of a soul, and which of their own accord, and of their own free heart, they bring into the temple of the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Joas sanoi papeille: kaikki pyhitetyt rahat, jotka tuodaan Herran huoneesen, nimittäin raha jokaiselta ohitsekäyvältä, raha minkä kukin antaa veroksi hengeltänsä, ja kaikki raha, minkä itsekukin uhraa vapaasta sydämestä, ne kannettakaan Herran huoneesen.
verses.king_james: And Jehoash said to the priests, All the money of the dedicated things that is brought into the house of the Lord, even the money of every one that passeth the account, the money that every man is set at, and all the money that cometh into any man’s heart to bring into the house of the Lord,

verses.latin_vulgate: accipiant illam sacerdotes juxta ordinem suum, et instaurent sartatecta domus, si quid necessarium viderint instauratione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִקְח֤וּ לָהֶם֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים אִ֖ישׁ מֵאֵ֣ת מַכָּר֑וֹ וְהֵ֗ם יְחַזְּקוּ֙ אֶת־בֶּ֣דֶק הַבַּ֔יִת לְכֹ֛ל אֲשֶׁר־יִמָּצֵ֥א שָׁ֖ם בָּֽדֶק׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Let the priests take it according to their order and repair the house, wheresoever they shall see any thing that wanteth repairing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ottakaan papit sen itsellensä kukin tuttavaltansa; sillä pitää heidän parantaman sen, mikä rauvennut on Herran huoneessa, kussa ikänä he löytävät olevan rauvenneen.
verses.king_james: Let the priests take it to them, every man of his acquaintance: and let them repair the breaches of the house, wheresoever any breach shall be found.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur usque ad vigesimum tertium annum regis Joas, non instauraverunt sacerdotes sartatecta templi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י בִּשְׁנַ֨ת עֶשְׂרִ֧ים וְשָׁלֹ֛שׁ שָׁנָ֖ה לַמֶּ֣לֶךְ יְהוֹאָ֑שׁ לֹא־חִזְּק֥וּ הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים אֶת־בֶּ֥דֶק הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now till the three and twentieth year of king Joas the priests did not make the repairs of the temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kolmaanteenkolmattakymmentä kuningas Joaksen vuoteen ei olleet papit parantaneet sitä, mikä Herran huoneessa rauvennut oli.
verses.king_james: But it was so, that in the three and twentieth year of king Jehoash the priests had not repaired the breaches of the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavitque rex Joas Jojadam pontificem et sacerdotes, dicens eis : Quare sartatecta non instauratis templi ? nolite ergo amplius accipere pecuniam juxta ordinem vestrum, sed ad instaurationem templi reddite eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָא֩ הַמֶּ֨לֶךְ יְהוֹאָ֜שׁ לִיהוֹיָדָ֤ע הַכֹּהֵן֙ וְלַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֲלֵהֶ֔ם מַדּ֛וּעַ אֵינְכֶ֥ם מְחַזְּקִ֖ים אֶת־בֶּ֣דֶק הַבָּ֑יִת וְעַתָּ֗ה אַל־תִּקְחֽוּ־כֶ֙סֶף֙ מֵאֵ֣ת מַכָּרֵיכֶ֔ם כִּֽי־לְבֶ֥דֶק הַבַּ֖יִת תִּתְּנֻֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king Joas called Joiada, the high priest, and the priests, saying to them: Why do you not repair the temple? Take you, therefore, money no more according to your order, but restore it for the repairing of the temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kutsui kuningas Joas papin Jojadan ja muut papit ja sanoi heille: miksi ette paranna sitä, mikä huoneessa rauvennut on? Niin ei pidä nyt teidän ottaman niitä rahoja tykönne kukin tuttavaltansa; mutta antakaat siihen, mikä rauvennut on huoneessa.
verses.king_james: Then king Jehoash called for Jehoiada the priest, and the other priests, and said unto them, Why repair ye not the breaches of the house? now therefore receive no more money of your acquaintance, but deliver it for the breaches of the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prohibitique sunt sacerdotes ultra accipere pecuniam a populo, et instaurare sartatecta domus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּאֹ֖תוּ הַכֹּהֲנִ֑ים לְבִלְתִּ֤י קְחַת־כֶּ֙סֶף֙ מֵאֵ֣ת הָעָ֔ם וּלְבִלְתִּ֥י חַזֵּ֖ק אֶת־בֶּ֥דֶק הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests were forbidden to take any more money of the people, and to make the repairs of the house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit mielistyivät, ettei heidän pitänyt ottaman rahaa kansalta eikä parantaman sitä, mikä rauvennut oli huoneessa.
verses.king_james: And the priests consented to receive no more money of the people, neither to repair the breaches of the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tulit Jojada pontifex gazophylacium unum, aperuitque foramen desuper, et posuit illud juxta altare ad dexteram ingredientium domum Domini : mittebantque in eo sacerdotes qui custodiebant ostia, omnem pecuniam quæ deferebatur ad templum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֞ח יְהוֹיָדָ֤ע הַכֹּהֵן֙ אֲר֣וֹן אֶחָ֔ד וַיִּקֹּ֥ב חֹ֖ר בְּדַלְתּ֑וֹ וַיִּתֵּ֣ן אֹתוֹ֩ אֵ֨צֶל הַמִּזְבֵּ֜חַ (בימין) [מִיָּמִ֗ין] בְּבוֹא־אִישׁ֙ בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֔ה וְנָֽתְנוּ־שָׁ֤מָּה הַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ שֹׁמְרֵ֣י הַסַּ֔ף אֶת־כׇּל־הַכֶּ֖סֶף הַמּוּבָ֥א בֵית־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joiada, the high priest, took a chest, and bored a hole in the top, and set it by the altar at the right hand of them that came into the house of the Lord; and the priests that kept the doors, put therein all the money that was brought to the temple of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pappi Jojada otti arkun ja lävisti läven kanteen ja pani sen oikialle puolelle alttaria, josta käydään Herran huoneesen sisälle. Ja papit, jotka vartioitsivat ovea, panivat sinne kaikki ne rahat, jotka tuotiin Herran huoneesen.
verses.king_james: But Jehoiada the priest took a chest, and bored a hole in the lid of it, and set it beside the altar, on the right side as one cometh into the house of the Lord: and the priests that kept the door put therein all the money that was brought into the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque viderent nimiam pecuniam esse in gazophylacio, ascendebat scriba regis, et pontifex, effundebantque et numerabant pecuniam quæ inveniebatur in domo Domini :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ כִּרְאוֹתָ֔ם כִּי־רַ֥ב הַכֶּ֖סֶף בָּאָר֑וֹן וַיַּ֨עַל סֹפֵ֤ר הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ וְהַכֹּהֵ֣ן הַגָּד֔וֹל וַיָּצֻ֙רוּ֙ וַיִּמְנ֔וּ אֶת־הַכֶּ֖סֶף הַנִּמְצָ֥א בֵית־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they saw that there was very much money in the chest, the king's scribe, and the high priest, came up, and poured it out, and counted the money that was found in the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin he näkivät paljon rahaa olevan arkussa, tuli kuninkaan kirjoittaja ja ylimmäinen pappi ylös, ja sitoivat rahan yhteen, joka Herran huoneesta löyttiin, sitte kuin he olivat sen lukeneet.
verses.king_james: And it was so, when they saw that there was much money in the chest, that the king’s scribe and the high priest came up, and they put up in bags, and told the money that was found in the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: et dabant eam juxta numerum atque mensuram in manu eorum qui præerant cæmentariis domus Domini : qui impendebant eam in fabris lignorum et in cæmentariis, iis qui operabantur in domo Domini,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָֽתְנוּ֙ אֶת־הַכֶּ֣סֶף הַֽמְתֻכָּ֔ן עַל־[יְדֵי֙] (יד) עֹשֵׂ֣י הַמְּלָאכָ֔ה (הפקדים) [הַמֻּפְקָדִ֖ים] בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיּוֹצִיאֻ֜הוּ לְחָרָשֵׁ֤י הָעֵץ֙ וְלַבֹּנִ֔ים הָעֹשִׂ֖ים בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they gave it out by number and measure into the hands of them that were over the builders of the house of the Lord: and they laid it out to the carpenters, and the masons, that wrought in the house of the Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he antoivat valmiin rahan teettäjille, jotka olivat asetetut Herran huoneesen; ja he antoivat ne puusepille, jotka rakensivat ja työtä tekivät Herran huoneessa,
verses.king_james: And they gave the money, being told, into the hands of them that did the work, that had the oversight of the house of the Lord: and they laid it out to the carpenters and builders, that wrought upon the house of the Lord,

verses.latin_vulgate: et sartatecta faciebant : et in iis qui cædebant saxa, et ut emerent ligna, et lapides, qui excidebantur, ita ut impleretur instauratio domus Domini in universis quæ indigebant expensa ad muniendam domum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלַגֹּֽדְרִים֙ וּלְחֹצְבֵ֣י הָאֶ֔בֶן וְלִקְנ֤וֹת עֵצִים֙ וְאַבְנֵ֣י מַחְצֵ֔ב לְחַזֵּ֖ק אֶת־בֶּ֣דֶק בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֑ה וּלְכֹ֛ל אֲשֶׁר־יֵצֵ֥א עַל־הַבַּ֖יִת לְחׇזְקָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And made the repairs: and to them that cut stones, and to buy timber, and stones to be hewed, that the repairs of the house of the Lord might be completely finished, and wheresoever there was need of expenses to uphold the house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja muuraajille, ja kivenhakkaajille, ja niille, jotka hirsiä ja vuoltuja kiviä ostivat, parantaaksensa mitä rauvennut oli Herran huoneessa ja kaikkiin, mitkä he huoneessa löysivät parannusta tarvitsevan.
verses.king_james: And to masons, and hewers of stone, and to buy timber and hewed stone to repair the breaches of the house of the Lord, and for all that was laid out for the house to repair it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen non fiebant ex eadem pecunia hydriæ templi Domini, et fuscinulæ, et thuribula, et tubæ, et omne vas aureum et argenteum, de pecunia quæ inferebatur in templum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַךְ֩ לֹ֨א יֵעָשֶׂ֜ה בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֗ה סִפּ֥וֹת כֶּ֙סֶף֙ מְזַמְּר֤וֹת מִזְרָקוֹת֙ חֲצֹ֣צְר֔וֹת כׇּל־כְּלִ֥י זָהָ֖ב וּכְלִי־כָ֑סֶף מִן־הַכֶּ֖סֶף הַמּוּבָ֥א בֵית־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But there were not made of the same money for the temple of the Lord, bowls, or fleshhooks, or censers, or trumpets, or any vessel of gold and silver, of the money that was brought into the temple of the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei kuitenkaan tehty hopiamaljoja, psaltareita, viskaimia, torvia, taikka jotakin kultaista eli hopiaista astiaa Herran huoneesen niistä rahoista, jotka Herran huoneesen tuodut olivat.
verses.king_james: Howbeit there were not made for the house of the Lord bowls of silver, snuffers, basons, trumpets, any vessels of gold, or vessels of silver, of the money that was brought into the house of the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: Iis enim qui faciebant opus, dabatur ut instauraretur templum Domini :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־לְעֹשֵׂ֥י הַמְּלָאכָ֖ה יִתְּנֻ֑הוּ וְחִזְּקוּ־ב֖וֹ אֶת־בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: For it was given to them that did the work, that the temple of the Lord might be repaired.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ne annettiin työväelle, että he niillä parantaisivat Herran huoneen.
verses.king_james: But they gave that to the workmen, and repaired therewith the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: et non fiebat ratio iis hominibus qui accipiebant pecuniam ut distribuerent eam artificibus, sed in fide tractabant eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֧א יְחַשְּׁב֣וּ אֶת־הָאֲנָשִׁ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִתְּנ֤וּ אֶת־הַכֶּ֙סֶף֙ עַל־יָדָ֔ם לָתֵ֖ת לְעֹשֵׂ֣י הַמְּלָאכָ֑ה כִּ֥י בֶאֱמֻנָ֖ה הֵ֥ם עֹשִֽׂים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they reckoned not with the men that received the money to distribute it to the workmen, but they bestowed it faithfully.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne miehet ei tarvinneet lukua tehdä, joiden käsiin raha annettiin, työväelle annettaa; vaan he toimittivat sen uskollisesti.
verses.king_james: Moreover they reckoned not with the men, into whose hand they delivered the money to be bestowed on workmen: for they dealt faithfully.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pecuniam vero pro delicto, et pecuniam pro peccatis non inferebant in templum Domini, quia sacerdotum erat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֶּ֤סֶף אָשָׁם֙ וְכֶ֣סֶף חַטָּא֔וֹת לֹ֥א יוּבָ֖א בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה לַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים יִהְיֽוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But the money for trespass, and the money for sins, they brought not into the temple of the Lord, because it was for the priests.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta rikosuhrin ja syntiuhrin rahoja ei tuotu Herran huoneesen; sillä ne olivat pappein.
verses.king_james: The trespass money and sin money was not brought into the house of the Lord: it was the priests’.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc ascendit Hazaël rex Syriæ, et pugnabat contra Geth, cepitque eam : et direxit faciem suam ut ascenderet in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֣ז יַעֲלֶ֗ה חֲזָאֵל֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ אֲרָ֔ם וַיִּלָּ֥חֶם עַל־גַּ֖ת וַֽיִּלְכְּדָ֑הּ וַיָּ֤שֶׂם חֲזָאֵל֙ פָּנָ֔יו לַעֲל֖וֹת עַל־יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Hazael, king of Syria, went up, and fought against Geth, and took it, and set his face to go up to Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin matkusti Hasael Syrian kuningas ja soti Gatia vastaan, ja voitti sen. Ja Hasael käänsi itsensä menemään ylös Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: Then Hazael king of Syria went up, and fought against Gath, and took it: and Hazael set his face to go up to Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quam ob rem tulit Joas rex Juda omnia sanctificata quæ consecraverant Josaphat, et Joram, et Ochozias, patres ejus reges Juda, et quæ ipse obtulerat : et universum argentum quod inveniri potuit in thesauris templi Domini et in palatio regis : misitque Hazaëli regi Syriæ, et recessit ab Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֞ח יְהוֹאָ֣שׁ מֶלֶךְ־יְהוּדָ֗ה אֵ֣ת כׇּל־הַקֳּדָשִׁ֡ים אֲשֶׁר־הִקְדִּ֣ישׁוּ יְהוֹשָׁפָ֣ט וִיהוֹרָם֩ וַאֲחַזְיָ֨הוּ אֲבֹתָ֜יו מַלְכֵ֤י יְהוּדָה֙ וְאֶת־קֳדָשָׁ֔יו וְאֵ֣ת כׇּל־הַזָּהָ֗ב הַנִּמְצָ֛א בְּאֹצְר֥וֹת בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֖ה וּבֵ֣ית הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וַיִּשְׁלַ֗ח לַֽחֲזָאֵל֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ אֲרָ֔ם וַיַּ֖עַל מֵעַ֥ל יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wherefore Joas, king of Juda, took all the sanctified things, which Josaphat, and Joram, and Ochozias, his fathers, the kings of Juda, had dedicated to holy uses, and which he himself had offered: and all the silver that could be found in the treasures of the temple of the Lord, and in the king's palace: and sent it to Hazael, king of Syria, and he went off from Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin otti Joas Juudan kuningas kaikki pyhitetyt, jotka hänen esivanhempansa Josaphat, Joram ja Ahasia Juudan kuninkaat olivat pyhittäneet, ja ne mitkä hän itse pyhittänyt oli, niin myös kaiken kullan, joka löyttiin Herran huoneen tavaroista ja kuninkaan huoneesta, ja lähetti Hasaelille Syrian kuninkaalle; sitte hän meni Jerusalemista pois.
verses.king_james: And Jehoash king of Judah took all the hallowed things that Jehoshaphat, and Jehoram, and Ahaziah, his fathers, kings of Judah, had dedicated, and his own hallowed things, and all the gold that was found in the treasures of the house of the Lord, and in the king’s house, and sent it to Hazael king of Syria: and he went away from Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Joas, et universa quæ fecit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro verborum dierum regum Juda ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֛תֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י יוֹאָ֖שׁ וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הֲלוֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the rest of the acts of Joas, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Juda?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi on Joaksesta sanomista, ja kaikista, mitä hän tehnyt on: eikö ne ole kirjoitetut Juudan kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: And the rest of the acts of Joash, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexerunt autem servi ejus, et conjuraverunt inter se, percusseruntque Joas in domo Mello in descensu Sella.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּקֻ֥מוּ עֲבָדָ֖יו וַיִּקְשְׁרוּ־קָ֑שֶׁר וַיַּכּוּ֙ אֶת־יוֹאָ֔שׁ בֵּ֥ית מִלֹּ֖א הַיֹּרֵ֥ד סִלָּֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his servants arose, and conspired among themselves, and slew Joas, in the house of Mello, in the descent of Sella.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen palveliansa nousivat ja tekivät liiton, ja löivät Joaksen kuoliaaksi Millon huoneessa, josta mennään alas Sillaan:
verses.king_james: And his servants arose, and made a conspiracy, and slew Joash in the house of Millo, which goeth down to Silla.

verses.latin_vulgate: Josachar namque filius Semaath, et Jozabad filius Somer servi ejus, percusserunt eum, et mortuus est : et sepelierunt eum cum patribus suis in civitate David : regnavitque Amasias filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיוֹזָכָ֣ר בֶּן־שִׁ֠מְעָ֠ת וִיהוֹזָבָ֨ד בֶּן־שֹׁמֵ֤ר ׀ עֲבָדָיו֙ הִכֻּ֣הוּ וַיָּמֹ֔ת וַֽיִּקְבְּר֥וּ אֹת֛וֹ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֖יו בְּעִ֣יר דָּוִ֑ד וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ אֲמַצְיָ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For Josachar the son of Semaath, and Jozabad the son of Somer his servant, struck him, and he died: and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David; and Amasias, his son, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nimittäin Josabar Simeatin poika ja Josabad Somerin poika, hänen palveliansa, löivät hänen kuoliaaksi. Ja hän haudattiin isäinsä kanssa Davidin kaupunkiin. Ja Amatsia hänen poikansa tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: For Jozachar the son of Shimeath, and Jehozabad the son of Shomer, his servants, smote him, and he died; and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David: and Amaziah his son reigned in his stead.
